courseTitle: Applied Game Mathematics, Technical Art, and Production Pipelines
title: Vector Billiards Game
genericDescription: Apply vector reflection, dot products, collision normals, and angle prediction; expose mathematical behavior through readable play.
specificDescription: Build a billiards, ricochet shooter, laser puzzle, or pinball-like game where bounce angles are central. Include an optional debug overlay showing incoming vector, surface normal, and reflected vector.
gradingRubric: 30 pts mathematical correctness; 20 pts readable physics feedback; 20 pts complete game loop; 15 pts debug visualization; 15 pts tuning and documentation.
